title: 攬炒巴團隊就政府聲明之回應

replies.msg:
Fight for Freedom. Stand with Hong Kong.
28 mins ·
【HK Government's Response】
The HK government has responded to media reports saying that Fight for Freedom. Stand with Hong Kong. had invited religious and faith leaders across the UK to sign a letter (http://bit.ly/35UynPC) to urge the UK government to ensure the lives and freedoms of Hong Kong people are protected.

"It also objected to the organisation’s remarks that the people of Hong Kong have endured suppression of their basic freedoms and human rights in their fight for justice and democracy and that they have been routinely subjected to police brutality and state repression in the last six months. These accusations are groundless, insulting and malicious, it said, adding that nothing could be further from the truth."

Our response to the HK government:
You know that you are lying.
We know that you are lying.
You know that we know you are lying.
Yet you still keep on lying.
When will you stop?

#FightForFreedom #StandWithHK #HongKong
https://www.info.gov.hk/gia/general/201912/26/P2019122600492.htm

https://www.facebook.com/standwithhk/photos/a.730947324002605/846825735748096/
